evals.prompt: Create a new test for src/styles-overrides/shared-style-overrides.js following repository conventions and without touching private members.
evals.expected_output: Generates a mirrored test at test/styles-overrides/shared-style-overrides.test.js with OpenWC + Sinon structure and public-behavior validation.
expectations: The generated file ends with .test.js and is placed under test/ using a mirrored path
There are no references to private members with _ or # prefixes
It includes suite, setup, teardown, and sinon.restore

evals.prompt: Increase coverage for the target file to 100% in Statements, Branches, Functions, and Lines using only public API.
evals.expected_output: Updates existing tests to cover guards, branches, and error paths without coupling to internal details.
expectations: Tests do not invoke private functions directly
Uncovered branches highlighted in lcov-report are covered
Evidence of 100% for the target file is reported

evals.prompt: Validate a newly created test and detect naming/structure/private-convention violations.
evals.expected_output: Runs the validator and returns a clear report with actionable errors.
expectations: The validator flags files outside test/ or without a .test.js suffix
The validator detects use of _private or #private references
The validator enforces minimum suite/setup/teardown/test structure
